title: Clarification on liling of e-form RD- l-Conversion of public company into private company and change in a Flnancial Year
description: Clarification on liling of e-form RD- l-Conversion of public company into private company and change in a Flnancial Year
text: General Circular No. O3/2Of9 F.No. Ol / 13/2013-CL-V-PI-II GOVERNMENT OF INDIA MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS Sth Floor, A'Wing Shastri Bhawan, Dr. R.P. Road, New Delhi Dated, 11.O3.2O19 To, All Regional Directors, All Registrars of Companres, All Stakeholders. Subject: Clarification on liling of e-form RD- l-Conversion of public company into private company and change in a Flnancial Year-reg. Sir/Madam. This Ministry vide notihcation no. c.S.R 1219(E) dated 18l12lIB has notified Companies (Incorporation Fourth Amendment) Rules, 20 18, whereby applications :uls 2{$1\ (change in a financial year) and u/s 14 of the Companies Act, 20 13 (conversion of public limited company into private coinpany), along with e-form RD-1 shall be processed by Regional Directors. 2.Stakeholders have expressed certain difhculties in filing e-form RD-1 on account of aforesaid two purposes pending deployment of revised version of e-form RD- 1. It is therefore clarified and Regional Directors are advised to process e-form RD-1 for the above referred applications, if 'others'is seiected on account of aforesaid two counts, till the revised form is deployed by this ministry. 3. Further, it is also clarified that such applications filed in e-form no.RD-1 should not be rejected merely on the ground that "others" is selected and "e- form is not available", till the said form is deployed by this Ministry. 4. This issues with the approval of the competent authority. Yours faithfully, (K hffanan) As istant Director Copy to: - Guard file. -- 1 of 1 --
